hooks.command: cd /Users/jimrice1959/Documents/workspace/tech-prep/claude/ClaudeEventManager_Java_1 && if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && FILES=$(git diff --staged --name-only | sort -u) && COUNT=$(echo "$FILES" | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && SHORT=$(echo "$FILES" | head -3 | xargs basename -a 2>/dev/null | paste -sd ', ') && MSG=$(if [ "$COUNT" -gt 3 ]; then echo "Update $COUNT files: $SHORT, ..."; else echo "Update: $SHORT"; fi) && git commit -m "$MSG" && git push origin main; fi 2>/dev/null || true
